title: (Bee's) Banner Pattern Clarity
description: Retextures of banner pattern items, compatible with mods
body: ### About 📜 This simple resource pack makes banner patterns distinguishable from each other. This means retextures of the items so that their respective pattern is visible on the item. That way you don't have to hover over it with your mouse cursor to find out which one it is! (This was implemented in vanilla in 1.21.2. Banner Pattern Clarity still works with both older versions that don't have this feature, but also newer ones that do!) It also works with some mods (see below). No mods are required! ### Mod support This pack supports: - [Alex's Mobs](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/alexs-mobs) - [Autumnity](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/autumnity) - [Buzzier Bees](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/buzzier-bees) - [Windswept](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/windsweptmod) ### Compatibility You might receive an in-game "made for a newer version of Minecraft" warning if you're not playing on the latest version. You can freely ignore it if you're playing on a version the resource pack file is tagged with. ### Collections Here are my other packs that go well with this one! - [My **Vanilla+ Collections**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/vanillacollections) ∗ a pack of extensive texture improvements, from grass to resources - [**Fancy Crops**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fancy-crops) ∗ my take on prettier crop farming with new variable textures and models - [**Fine Armoury**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fine-armoury) ∗ many retextures of tools, weapons, and armour - [**Serified Font**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/serified-font) ∗ my take on a much fancier font - [**Fluffy Carpets and Wool**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/fluffy-carpets) ∗ my take on much fluffier wool and carpets (currently unavailable on Modrinth) - [**Cosier Beds**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/cozier-beds) ∗ my take on prettier and cosier bed models (currently unavailable on Modrinth) - [**Blockier Goat Horn**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/blockier-goat-horn) ∗ gives the goat horn a silly model in your hand I also make all kinds of data packs, like [**Geophilic**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/geophilic), the vanilla biome overhaul pack! You should visit my profile to see them all! You can also visit my [**website**](https://everloste.github.io/) to see everything I do, join my [**Discord community**](https://everloste.github.io/discord), or give me a small tip on [**Ko-fi**](https://everloste.github.io/ko-fi). Thank you and have fun! <3
